word: H4769 - מַרְבֵּץ - marbêts - mar-bates' - Couching place

sections.paragraph:
Original: מרבּץ

Transliteration: marbêts

Phonetic: mar-bates'

BDB Definition:

  1. place of lying down, resting or dwelling place
    1. of wild beasts

Origin: from H7257

TWOT entry: 2109b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
